eval_dimensions.name: Task Tracking
eval_dimensions.description: Creates exactly 3 tasks at startup (Discover, Route, Summary) with sequential dependencies; marks each completed as phases finish

eval_dimensions.name: Open Loop Discovery
eval_dimensions.description: Phase 1 auto-scan collects in-session tasks, git status, TODOs, open PRs, project TODO file, and MEMORY.md in-progress section

eval_dimensions.name: Decision Gates
eval_dimensions.description: Phase 2 gap-fill and Phase 3 per-item triage use AskUserQuestion (not plain text) for every blocking choice

eval_dimensions.name: Item Routing
eval_dimensions.description: Offers Finish-now / Defer / Drop for each open loop; delegates Defer items to Dev10x:park via Skill() call

eval_dimensions.name: Session State Persistence
eval_dimensions.description: Phase 3b writes pending tasks, continuation prompt, insights, and a freshness stamp (branch/tickets/wrapped_at) to .claude/Dev10x/session.yaml; never writes durable keys (friction_level/active_modes) — those live in config.yaml post-GH-774 (GH-782)

eval_dimensions.name: Task List Invariant
eval_dimensions.description: Skill never empties the task list — leaves at least one open task (Verify AC) when all other items are resolved

evals.name: Creates 3 tasks at startup with sequential dependencies
evals.description: Verifies REQUIRED task creation contract: Discover, Route, Summary with blocked-by chain.

assertions.signal: At least 3 TaskCreate calls at startup: Discover open items, Route deferred items, Post session summary
TaskUpdate called with addBlockedBy to set sequential dependencies
Sequential dependencies set: Route blocked by Discover, Summary blocked by Route

evals.name: Phase 1 auto-scan collects all loop sources
evals.description: Verifies all 6 scan sources are checked: TaskList, git status, git diff TODOs, pr_detect, TODO.md, MEMORY.md.

assertions.signal: TaskList called during Phase 1 to collect in-session tasks
git status --short called to find uncommitted files
pr_detect called with no arg to find open PR for current branch
Phase 2 output includes '## Session Wrap-up — Open Loops Found' summary block

evals.name: Phase 2 gap-fill uses AskUserQuestion
evals.description: After presenting open loops, the skill must use AskUserQuestion for the free-text gap-fill — plain text is prohibited.

assertions.signal: AskUserQuestion called at Phase 2 'Is there anything else?' gap-fill point
No inline 'Is there anything else to capture?' plain text before the AskUserQuestion call

evals.name: Phase 3 per-item triage uses AskUserQuestion for each item
evals.description: For each open loop, the skill must present Finish-now / Defer / Drop via AskUserQuestion — not plain text.

assertions.signal: AskUserQuestion called with options Finish now / Defer / Drop for each item
Options include 'Finish now'
Options include 'Defer'
Options include 'Drop'

evals.name: Defer selection delegates to Dev10x:park via Skill()
evals.description: When user picks Defer, skill must call Skill(Dev10x:park) — not inline text or raw file writes.

setup.note: User selects Defer for the first open item

assertions.signal: Skill(Dev10x:park) called after user picks Defer — not raw Write to TODO.md
Skill parameter passed to the Skill() call is Dev10x:park
Skill does not write directly to .claude/TODO.md without going through Dev10x:park

evals.name: Phase 3b writes ephemeral state + freshness stamp, no durable keys
evals.description: After triage, skill persists tasks+continuation_prompt+insights plus a freshness stamp (branch/tickets/wrapped_at) to session.yaml, and does NOT write durable keys (friction_level/active_modes) — those live in config.yaml (GH-774/GH-782).

setup.note: Durable prefs live in config.yaml; session.yaml holds only ephemeral state

assertions.signal: Write tool called targeting .claude/Dev10x/session.yaml
Write tool file_path parameter targets .claude/Dev10x/session.yaml
Written content includes continuation_prompt field
Written content includes the wrapped_at freshness stamp (GH-782) alongside branch/tickets identity
friction_level and active_modes are NOT written into session.yaml — durable keys stay in config.yaml (GH-774)

evals.name: Skill never leaves task list empty
evals.description: When all items are resolved (drop/defer), a Verify AC task must be seeded before the skill completes.

setup.note: User drops or defers every item — no Finish-now selections

assertions.signal: TaskCreate called with subject containing 'Verify AC' before skill returns control
The Verify AC task is left pending — skill does NOT mark it completed autonomously

should_trigger.query: let's wrap up for today and save my progress
should_trigger.rationale: Explicit session-end signal — primary use case

should_trigger.query: I'm done for today, let's capture any open loops
should_trigger.rationale: User signals end of session with open-loop awareness

should_trigger.query: pause — I need to close this session but there's still CI running
should_trigger.rationale: Unconfirmed CI is a hard trigger for session-wrap-up

should_trigger.query: that's it for now, let me park whatever is outstanding
should_trigger.rationale: 'park' + session-end context maps to session-wrap-up orchestration

should_not_trigger.query: add a TODO: fix the retry logic here
should_not_trigger.rationale: Adding a single TODO mid-session — inline note, not a full wrap-up

should_not_trigger.query: park this idea about caching for later
